title: Session summary 2026-05-31
details:
Session 2026-05-31: Major project enhancement. 

Completed in this session:
1. Migrated from Jekyll to Astro 5 + Preact + Tailwind CSS v4
2. Full English translations of all 15 modules (~200-400 lines each, not stubs)
3. Added ~80 FAQ sections across all 15 modules in RU+EN
4. Expanded Module 1 (Cosmology) with 4 new symbols: Bridge (Мост), Mirror (Зеркало), Threshold (Порог), Seed (Семя)
5. Created Scientific Foundations appendix (Module 99): thermodynamics, neuroscience, evolutionary ethics, systems thinking, philosophy
6. Created Community Startup Guide (Module 98): 8 sections, 9-step checklist
7. Glossary: 24 key terms in RU+EN
8. Interactive components: PathTracker, DailyChecklist, EthicalCompass, Search, ProgressBar, BookmarkButton, ModuleGraph (D3)
9. Table of Contents auto-generation on module pages
10. Prev/Next module navigation
11. Print styles, PWA manifest, sitemap.xml, RSS feed, Twitter cards
12. Improved 404 with search suggestions
13. Standard repo files: README, LICENSE (CC BY-SA 4.0), CONTRIBUTING, TRANSLATION, CODE_OF_CONDUCT
14. CodeGraph initialized
15. All docs/ synced with web/src/content/
16. Git: 8 commits on main, pushed to GitHub + GitVerse

Site: 53 pages at https://alexandernarbaev.github.io/ThePath/
Base path: /ThePath (hardcoded in all components)
CI/CD: .github/workflows/deploy.yml + .gitverse/workflows/deploy.yml
Dual remotes: origin (GitHub) + gitverse (GitVerse)
